prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Column/beam erection & plumb, part of the Structural & Ironwork scope. The observed field condition is: anchor bolts field-bent to fit. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: AISC 303, OSHA 1926 Subpart R. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Column/beam erection & plumb (commercial project)
